calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-04-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840
Petitioners Qiongbo Huang and Dimei Yuan; father and mother of minor present in court.
Petitioners sworn and examined through Cantonese Interpreter Shan Ouyang.
Proof of Publication on file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Xialian Huang to Saly Xialian Huang.
The court also grants the Petition for Name Change for the Petitioner and father, from Qioingbo Huang to Paul Qiongbo Huang.
Decree Changing Names signed in open court.
